# Solaris Roadmap Milestones

- 2024: Tandem cell prototype at 28.4% efficiency (achieved)
- 2025: Pilot-line manufacturing at 100 MW/year capacity
- 2026: Certification for outdoor deployment (25-year degradation target)
- 2027: Commercial launch targeting 32% module-level efficiency

Budget: USD 180M over three years, funded by the Helios Labs parent group and
a Japanese METI grant.
